reason: This is a standard STIG hardening measure for PAM password policy, specifically the maxclassrepeat parameter in /etc/security/pwquality.conf. It enforces stronger password requirements without introducing critical system risks or access issues, aligning with the policy to mark auth-related changes as safe_to_remediate.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential user lockouts if existing passwords do not comply with the new maxclassrepeat setting
